author: Yamada
text: Resident walked slower than baseline after lunch; gait looked cautious near the hallway turn.

author: Sato
text: Resident refused the evening medication and said, 'I do not want it tonight.'

author: Yamada
text: Noise from the corridor seemed to agitate the resident; they asked staff to keep the room quiet.

author: Tanaka
text: Gait remained slower than baseline but steady with walker support.

author: Sato
text: Resident again refused medication and repeated, 'I do not want it tonight.'
